data.content: Implementation review: APPROVED. Diff on worktree-foolery-2782 @ c1704a95 matches all 5 acceptance criteria. Scope is clean — only the 3 in-plan files touched. The new fireWatchdogTimeout helper isolates the log+event emission before terminateProcessGroup, and the setTimeout callback is kept small. No spillover into onResult/handleResultEvent (foolery-a401), terminateProcessGroup body (foolery-062f), or child_close logs (foolery-e750). Unit test in agent-session-runtime-watchdog-fired.test.ts verifies invocation ordering via invocationCallOrder.
